ValidationRule.description: The contractual re-delivery date cannot be empty
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Redelivery_Terms__c , 'Redelivery Date Driven')&& ( ISNULL( leaseworks__Contractual_Redelivery_Date__c)) ,True,False)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Contractual Re-delivery Date is required when Re-delivery Term is marked to Redelivery Date Driven
